subject: Re: Final Report from Publicis Re CGI
body:
I want a complete brakdown of revenue and expenses

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Here is the report from Publicis.  According to the
> report, Forums is  
> entitled to be paid $223,821.39 and Sondra Thorson
> advised that an additional  
> $15,000 will be payable to Forums if and when Yahoo
> honors its $30,000  sponsorship 
> commitment.  I have already told Sondra not to make
> any  payments until 2006.
>  
> I need to compare this report with the report from
> November indicating that  
> close to $500,000 would be payable to Forums, so
> that I may understand what  
> caused the substantial reduction in profit.  I will
> have that comparison  and 
> analysis for you next week. Obviously, I want to
> receive whatever money we  can 
> before raising the issue with Publicis.
>  
> Darren
> 



		
__________________________________________ 
Yahoo! DSL – Something to write home about. 
Just $16.99/mo. or less. 
dsl.yahoo.com
body_html:
I want a complete brakdown of revenue and expenses

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Here is the report from Publicis. According to the
report, Forums is
entitled to be paid $223,821.39 and Sondra Thorson
advised that an additional
$15,000 will be payable to Forums if and when Yahoo
honors its $30,000 sponsorship
commitment. I have already told Sondra not to make
any payments until 2006.

I need to compare this report with the report from
November indicating that
close to $500,000 would be payable to Forums, so
that I may understand what
caused the substantial reduction in profit. I will
have that comparison and
analysis for you next week. Obviously, I want to
receive whatever money we can
before raising the issue with Publicis.

Darren

Yahoo! DSL – Something to write home about.
Just $16.99/mo. or less.
dsl.yahoo.com
